# Tech stack docs (source)

## Why this folder exists

Vite + React mini-site in `site/tech-stack-generator/`. Build output to repo-root `tech-stack-docs/` (see vite.config.ts + AGENTS.md).

## What is here

- src/ — pages and data
- vite.config.ts — outDir repo-root `tech-stack-docs/`, base `/tech-stack-docs/`

## See also

- `Readme.md`
- `Readme_Techstack.md`
- `COVERAGE-REPORT.md`

*Generated by `site/scripts/generate-contents-md.mjs` — edit manifest, then `pnpm run docs:sync:all` from repo root.*
